overview: A virtual functional medicine clinic that uses advanced lab testing, nutrition, supplements, and lifestyle strategies to identify and address the root causes of health issues.
highlights: Advanced lab testing including GI MAP, SIBO breath tests, and comprehensive hormonal panels
100% virtual consultations with initial 75-minute session and follow-up support
Customized nutrition plans and professional-grade supplement protocols
targetAudience: People seeking to understand root causes of chronic health issues who have felt dismissed by conventional medicine and want personalized, research-backed care.
